title: epipactis kartliana
intro: Epipactis kartliana, also known as the Kartli helleborine, is a rare orchid species native to the mountainous regions of the Caucasus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epipactis kartliana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Epipactis kartliana are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
